data.name: error.unexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: validation.failed
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: auth.invalid_credentials
data.value: Invalid email or password.

data.name: auth.email_verification_invalid
data.value: This email verification link is invalid or expired.

data.name: auth.password_reset_invalid
data.value: This password reset link is invalid or expired.

data.name: auth.refresh_token_invalid
data.value: The refresh token is invalid or has been revoked.

data.name: auth.refresh_token_reused
data.value: This session has been revoked for security reasons. Please sign in again.

data.name: user.not_found
data.value: User not found.

data.name: user.email_taken
data.value: This email address is already registered.

data.name: tenant.subdomain_taken
data.value: This subdomain is already taken.

data.name: tenant.module_not_entitled
data.value: This feature is not available for your workspace.

data.name: tenant.module_unknown
data.value: Unknown module key.

data.name: tenant.not_found
data.value: Workspace not found.

data.name: registration.not_allowed
data.value: Registration into this workspace is not allowed.

data.name: tenant.invite.expiry_out_of_range
data.value: The invite expiry must be between 1 and 30 days.

data.name: tenant.invite.collision
data.value: Could not mint a unique invite. Please retry.

data.name: tenancy.platform_plan_unknown
data.value: Unknown platform plan.

data.name: tenancy.platform_plan_misconfigured
data.value: The platform plan is not configured correctly.

data.name: auth.tenant_mismatch
data.value: This session does not belong to this workspace.

data.name: tenant.name.required
data.value: Workspace name is required.

data.name: tenant.name.too_long
data.value: Workspace name is too long.

data.name: tenant.subdomain.required
data.value: Subdomain is required.

data.name: tenant.subdomain.invalid
data.value: Subdomain may use only lowercase letters, digits and hyphens.

data.name: tenant.subdomain.reserved
data.value: This subdomain is reserved.

data.name: billing.gateway.unknown_provider
data.value: Unknown payment provider.

data.name: billing.gateway.stripe_key_required
data.value: A Stripe API key is required.

data.name: billing.gateway.gopay_goid_required
data.value: A GoPay merchant id (goid) is required.

data.name: billing.gateway.gopay_client_required
data.value: GoPay client credentials are required.

data.name: billing.gateway.stripe_webhook_secret_required
data.value: A Stripe webhook signing secret is required.

data.name: billing.gateway.fake_not_allowed
data.value: The fake payment gateway is not allowed in production.

data.name: billing.gateway.credentials_invalid
data.value: The payment gateway credentials could not be validated.

data.name: payment.gateway_not_configured
data.value: No payment gateway is configured for this workspace.

data.name: payment.gateway_inactive
data.value: The payment gateway for this workspace is not active.

data.name: machine_token.tenant_required
data.value: A tenant is required to issue a machine token.

data.name: machine_token.name_required
data.value: A machine token name is required.

data.name: machine_token.name_too_long
data.value: The machine token name is too long.

data.name: user.email.required
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: user.email.invalid
data.value: Email is not a valid address.

data.name: user.email.too_long
data.value: Email is too long.

data.name: user.password.required
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: user.password.too_short
data.value: Password is too short.

data.name: user.password.too_long
data.value: Password is too long.

data.name: user.display_name.too_long
data.value: Display name is too long.

data.name: user.accepted_terms_version.too_long
data.value: Terms version is too long.

data.name: user.current_password.required
data.value: Current password is required.

data.name: user.current_password_invalid
data.value: The current password is incorrect.

data.name: user.password_unchanged
data.value: The new password must differ from the current one.

data.name: user.locale.required
data.value: Locale is required.

data.name: user.locale.unsupported
data.value: This language is not supported.

data.name: role.not_found
data.value: Role not found.

data.name: operation.not_found
data.value: Operation not found.

data.name: operations.invoke_timeout
data.value: The quick worker request timed out.

data.name: operations.demo_input_invalid
data.value: The demo input is outside the allowed range.

data.name: operations.demo_timeout_invalid
data.value: The demo timeout is outside the allowed range.

data.name: operations.demo_delay_invalid
data.value: The demo worker delay is outside the allowed range.

data.name: operations.idempotency_key.too_long
data.value: The idempotency key is too long.

data.name: auth.required
data.value: Authentication required.

data.name: marketing.source_unknown
data.value: Unknown marketing source.

data.name: marketing.date_range_invalid
data.value: The start date must be on or before the end date.

data.name: marketing.vibe.message_required
data.value: Message content is required.

data.name: marketing.vibe.message_too_long
data.value: Message is too long (max 4000 characters).

data.name: marketing.vibe.conversation_not_found
data.value: Conversation not found.

data.name: marketing.pull_not_found
data.value: Pull not found.

data.name: marketing.source_not_supported
data.value: This marketing source is not supported yet.

data.name: marketing.pull_failed
data.value: The marketing data pull failed.

data.name: marketing.analysis_not_found
data.value: Analysis not found.

data.name: credit.insufficient_balance
data.value: Insufficient credit balance.

data.name: credit.account_not_found
data.value: Credit account not found.

data.name: credit.reservation_not_found
data.value: Credit reservation not found.

data.name: credit.reservation_not_active
data.value: The credit reservation is no longer active.

data.name: credit.bucket_underflow
data.value: Reserved credits are no longer backed by an active bucket.

data.name: credit.amount.must_be_positive
data.value: The amount must be a positive number.

data.name: credit.user.required
data.value: User is required.

data.name: credit.reservation.required
data.value: Reservation is required.

data.name: credit.idempotency_key.required
data.value: An idempotency key is required.

data.name: credit.idempotency_key.too_long
data.value: The idempotency key is too long.

data.name: credit.bucket_expiry.must_be_positive
data.value: The bucket expiry must be a positive number of days.

data.name: credit.hold_minutes.must_be_positive
data.value: The hold duration must be a positive number of minutes.

data.name: credit.amount.too_large
data.value: The amount exceeds the maximum allowed.

data.name: auth.locked_out
data.value: This account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.

data.name: notification.user.required
data.value: User is required.

data.name: notification.template_key.required
data.value: A template key is required.

data.name: notification.template_key.too_long
data.value: The template key is too long.

data.name: notification.channels.required
data.value: At least one channel is required.

data.name: notification.channel.invalid
data.value: Unknown notification channel.

data.name: notification.id.required
data.value: Notification id is required.

data.name: notification.template_not_found
data.value: Notification template not found.

data.name: notification.not_found
data.value: Notification not found.

data.name: gdpr.erasure.user_id.required
data.value: User id is required.

data.name: gdpr.consent.type.required
data.value: Consent type is required.

data.name: gdpr.consent.type.too_long
data.value: The consent type is too long.

data.name: gdpr.consent.policy_version.too_long
data.value: The policy version is too long.

data.name: file.not_found
data.value: File not found.

data.name: file.empty
data.value: The file is empty.

data.name: file.too_large
data.value: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size.

data.name: file.content_type.not_allowed
data.value: This file type is not allowed.

data.name: file.name.required
data.value: A file name is required.

data.name: file.name.too_long
data.value: The file name is too long.

data.name: file.id.required
data.value: File id is required.

data.name: file.link_not_found
data.value: File link not found.

data.name: file.link.owner_type.required
data.value: Owner type is required.

data.name: file.link.owner_type.too_long
data.value: Owner type is too long.

data.name: file.link.owner_type.invalid
data.value: Owner type has an invalid format.

data.name: file.link.owner_id.required
data.value: Owner id is required.

data.name: billing.stripe.not_configured
data.value: Stripe is not configured.

data.name: billing.package_not_found
data.value: Credit package not found.

data.name: billing.package_inactive
data.value: The credit package is not for sale.

data.name: billing.package.price_not_configured
data.value: The package has no Stripe price configured.

data.name: billing.package.name.required
data.value: A package name is required.

data.name: billing.package.name.too_long
data.value: The package name is too long.

data.name: billing.package.name_taken
data.value: A package with this name already exists.

data.name: billing.package.credit_amount.must_be_positive
data.value: The credit amount must be positive.

data.name: billing.package.price.must_not_be_negative
data.value: The price must not be negative.

data.name: billing.package.currency.required
data.value: A currency is required.

data.name: billing.package.currency.invalid
data.value: The currency must be a 3-letter ISO-4217 code.

data.name: billing.package.bucket_expiry.must_be_positive
data.value: The bucket expiry must be positive.

data.name: billing.package.stripe_price.too_long
data.value: The Stripe price id is too long.

data.name: billing.purchase_not_found
data.value: Purchase not found.

data.name: billing.coupon.invalid
data.value: Unknown or inactive promotion code.

data.name: billing.coupon.provider_failed
data.value: The promo-code provider rejected the request.

data.name: billing.subscription.plan_not_found
data.value: Unknown subscription plan.

data.name: billing.subscription.already_active
data.value: The user already has an active subscription.

data.name: billing.subscription.not_found
data.value: No active subscription.

data.name: billing.subscription.provider_failed
data.value: The subscription provider rejected the request.

data.name: billing.no_billing_account
data.value: No billing account yet. Subscribe or buy credits first.

data.name: billing.portal.invalid_return_url
data.value: Billing portal return URL is not configured correctly.

data.name: billing.portal.provider_failed
data.value: The billing portal provider rejected the request.

data.name: billing.subscription.plan_key.required
data.value: A plan key is required.

data.name: billing.subscription.plan_key.too_long
data.value: The plan key is too long.

data.name: crm.contact_not_found
data.value: Contact not found.

data.name: crm.contact.first_name.required
data.value: The first name is required.

data.name: crm.contact.first_name.too_long

data.value: The last name is required.

data.name: crm.contact.last_name.too_long
data.value: The last name is too long.

data.name: crm.contact.email.invalid
data.value: The contact email is not valid.

data.name: crm.contact.email.too_long
data.value: The contact email is too long.

data.name: crm.contact.phone.too_long
data.value: The contact phone is too long.

data.name: crm.contact.position.too_long
data.value: The position is too long.

data.name: crm.contact.notes.too_long
data.value: The notes are too long.

data.name: crm.contact.status.invalid
data.value: The contact status is not valid.

data.name: crm.contact.tags.too_many
data.value: Too many tags.

data.name: crm.contact.tag.too_long
data.value: A tag is too long.

data.name: crm.interaction.type.invalid
data.value: The interaction type is not valid.

data.name: crm.interaction.body.too_long
data.value: The interaction note is too long.

data.name: crm.meeting_not_found
data.value: Meeting not found.

data.name: crm.meeting.contact.required
data.value: A meeting must be linked to a contact.

data.name: crm.meeting.title.required
data.value: The meeting title is required.

data.name: crm.meeting.title.too_long
data.value: The meeting title is too long.

data.name: crm.meeting.scheduled_at.required
data.value: The meeting time is required.

data.name: crm.meeting.duration.invalid
data.value: The meeting duration is not valid.

data.name: crm.meeting.location.too_long
data.value: The meeting location is too long.

data.name: crm.meeting.notes.too_long
data.value: The meeting notes are too long.

data.name: crm.meeting.outcome.too_long
data.value: The meeting outcome is too long.

data.name: crm.meeting.invalid_transition
data.value: The meeting cannot change to that state.

data.value: Deal not found.

data.value: The deal title is required.

data.value: The deal stage is not valid.

data.value: The deal cannot change to that stage.

data.value: The deal probability is not valid.
